abstract.text: KeyboardKit helps you create fully customizable keyboard extensions, using Swift and SwiftUI.
This article describes the KeyboardKit callout engine.
Create a callout service for the provided locale.
This protocol is implemented by locale-specific services.
Pro callout services don’t trigger feedback.
Get secondary callout actions for a certain action.
This class is inherited by all Pro services and also
serves as a namespace for Pro service types.
Get secondary callout actions for a certain string.
This protocol can be implemented by any type that can be
used to perform keyboard-related callout actions.
Get s secondary callout string for a certain action.
